markdown:
[Timeline](index.html)

## Timeline - 12th F1TENTH Autonomous Grand Prix

Date (2023) | Race Event  
---|---  
January 6th | Registration opens   
January 27th | [Orientation 1](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1pYDJuXBUWZAg79w1Fh-e_Y9XEZvGJdTlVhz2ZNg4qoQ/edit?usp=sharing) (Discuss expectations, prospective participants can ask questions)  
April 14th | Registration closes, [Orientation 2](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1HwaTHaAuJc8zB1IyGuREzA_-j3Ltm6HqBr27rQFAizw/edit?usp=sharing) (Introduction of all teams, Race overview, Track overview)  
April 30th | Video Submission: Teams need to demonstrate driving with the F1TENTH vehicle before the competition  
May 7th | Setup Day: Track Construction and Testing  
May 8th | Competition Day 1: Qualification  
May 9th | Competition Day 2: Tournament Races, Award ceremony, Presentations
